since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.66%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +0.68% · Gold +0.47% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.66%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.66%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BIDU is the standout at -4.37%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +2.51%, EQIX +2.43%, ADBE +2.21%, ADBE +2.21%, ORCL +1.59%. Laggards: BIDU -4.37%, DELL -2.65%, AMBA -2.54%, ARM -2.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.42% at $156.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
